title: . Indorsement of cases to Labor Arbiters.
content:
. Indorsement of cases to Labor Arbiters. 
a. Except as provided in paragraph (b) of this Article, the Labor Arbiter shall entertain only cases 
endorsed to him for compulsory arbitration by the Bureau or by the Regional Director with a written 
notice of such indorsement or non-indorsement. The indorsement or non-indorsement of the 
Regional Director may be appealed to the Bureau within ten (10) working days from receipt of the 
notice. 
   
b. The parties may, at any time, by mutual agreement, withdraw a case from the Conciliation Section 
and jointly submit it to a Labor Arbiter, except deadlocks in collective bargaining.] (Repealed by 
Section 16, Batas Pambansa Bilang 130, August 21, 1981)
